title: Plenty O' Crates
description: An Apple Crates addon for the Biomes o' Plenty mod
body:
![BoP AppleCrates compat header](https://i.imgur.com/FsuhvcB.png)
## Plenty O' Crates
 


Mod is not affiliated with Biomes O' Plenty

This mod needs both [Apple Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/apple-crates) & [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) to properly work.


____________________________________________________________________________________

  

### General Information
 


Apple Crates is a mod that adds functional Crates in which you can stock items and set up shop.

This addon only adds in new crates, compatible with BoP



The added crates are :

- Dead
- Fir
- Hellbark
- Jacaranda
- Magic
- Mahogany
- Palm
- Redwood
- Umbran
- Willow
